Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Putian Information Technology.

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Putian Information Technology Co., Ltd. is a highly specialized state-owned subsidiary operating primarily as a property management and asset-holding vehicle, despite its sweeping high-tech business scope. Founded in 1994 and structured as a non-natural person wholly-owned entity, it is undeniably part of the state-owned China Potevio (Putian) Group, verified by its corporate email domain (@postel.com.cn) and its exclusive registration address on 'Putian Road'. A dramatic operational anomaly exists: it lists a massive scope covering 5G, satellite integration, and telecom manufacturing, yet reported only 1 insured employee in 2024. The inclusion of 'property management', 'non-residential real estate leasing', and 'parking lot services' reveals its true current function. It acts as the legacy real estate manager for Potevio's urban industrial park in Nanjing, utilizing its high-tech credentials solely as a bidding or holding shell for the parent group.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 80)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / ASSET MANAGEMENT & BIDDING SHELL
